description: This file defines a Bootstrap Alert component class, including methods for closing and destroying alert elements, and integrates with jQuery. It imports dependencies, defines constants, and registers the component as a plugin.

classes.name: Alert
classes.description: A class representing the Bootstrap alert component, extending BaseComponent, with methods to close and destroy alert elements.

methods.name: close
methods.description: Closes the alert by removing the show class and triggering the close event.

methods.name: _destroyElement
methods.description: Removes the alert element from the DOM and triggers the closed event.

methods.name: jQueryInterface
methods.description: Enables jQuery to instantiate and interact with alert components.
